name: lodash.find
use_when: Return the first element matching the predicate, or undefined. Common over individual.encounters / programEnrolment.getEncounters().
example_snippet: const dailyAttendance = _.find(individual.encounters, e => e.encounterType.name === 'Daily Attendance Form');

name: lodash.filter
use_when: Return every element matching the predicate.

name: lodash.chain
use_when: Open a lazy lodash pipeline. Terminate with `.value()`. Useful when filtering + mapping over encounter lists.

name: lodash.isNil
use_when: Treat null and undefined uniformly. Common before reading observation values.

name: lodash.isEmpty
use_when: True for empty arrays / strings / objects (and nil).

name: lodash.isEqual
use_when: Deep equality. Used to compare encounter type names, weekday strings, observation values.

name: lodash.get
use_when: Safely read a nested property. Common when walking groupSubjects / programEnrolment.individual.groups.
